guardrails.title: Follow Contribution Guidelines
guardrails.body: Follow the project's CONTRIBUTING.md and coding conventions in the repository. Do not introduce your own style.

guardrails.title: Small Focused PR
guardrails.body: Keep PRs focused on a single concern.

guardrails.title: Follow Commit Conventions
guardrails.body: Follow the project's commit message conventions (Conventional Commits, etc.) as defined in the repository.
